testcase.name: test_director_approve_request

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'approved' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeed4182a140>('status') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfeed4182a140> = {'message': 'Budget request approved'}.get
